title: Incorrect result for comparison with NULL
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 PRIMARY KEY DESC);
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 > NULL;
key_bug_features: Comparison with NULL in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', 1.1);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2, NULL, 2.2);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 > NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
